compressed_context:
H2: CLIMATE-CHANGE POLICIES (ART1; ART10)
MEMBERSTATES MUST:
  ELECTRICITY-CONSUMER PRICE=MKT;
  ELECTRICITY FROM NEW-INSTALLATIONS POST2009;
  PROD/EXPORT QUANTITIES ¬BENEFIT STATE-AID IN OTHER MEMBER/THIRD STATES
ENSURE LEVEL-PLAYING-FIELD FOR IMPORTS ∧ TRANSITS
STATE-SUPPORTED SUPPLIERS MAY IMPOSE SECURITY-OF-SUPPLY RESTRICTIONS
REMOVE ADMIN/INFRA BARRIERS TO CROSS-BORDER TRADE
ACCESS-TO-GRID ∧ GUARANTEES-OF-ORIGIN → PHYSICAL INFRASTRUCTURE
  OPERATED BY CONTROL-CENTRES
CTRY-LIST: AT; HR; CY; CZ; EE; FI; IS; IE; LT; NL; PL; PT; RO; SK; SI; ES; SE; UK
EXTENDED: FR; BE; IT; DK; LU; MT; BG; EL; HU
ASSERTION: LACK OF DETAILED TRACEABLE FRAMEWORK FOR TRANSFERS/PROJECTS
  → DIFFICULT ASSESSMENT BEYOND APPROVAL
ACCESS-TO-GRID + GUARANTEES-OF-ORIGIN → TECHNICAL DEPLOYMENT ON PHYSICAL-NET
REFERENCE: ART194(1&2) TFEU REQUIRES MEMBERSTATES TO DEVELOP ∧ INTEGRATE
  RENEWABLE-ELECTRICITY-SOURCES
NATIONAL-SUPPORT-SCHEMES MUST BE NON-DISCRIMINATORY ∧ MUTUALLY RECOGNISED
CHALLENGE: BIOFUELS FEEDSTOCKS ∧ BIOLIQUIDS SUBJECT SUSTAINABILITY-CRITERIA
  INCLUDES ENERGY-CROPS SEPARATE FROM FOOD-CROPS
IMPLICATIONS:
  DIRECT/INDIRECT LAND-USE-CHANGE → BIODIVERSITY-LOSS ∧ WATER-STRESS
  ∧ FOOD-DISPLACEMENT
